then.prompt:
Before building PWA, verify:
1. Check if public/icons/ directory exists and contains icons-192.png and icons-512.png
2. Check if manifest.webmanifest has correct icon paths (should include /icons/ subdirectory)
3. Check if vite.config.ts PWA config has correct icon paths
4. Check if .gitignore excludes /public/icons/ (should be commented out for GitHub Pages)

If any check fails, report the specific issue and suggest fix.
